arts.ttl: Milan to Try to Remove Real Madrid Hold over Youngster
arts.sum: Alex Jimenez is putting together a solid campaign, as, despite spotty minutes, he’s been convincing in multiple roles since joining Milan, and he was instrumental in the choral action that led to the late game-winner against Hellas Verona. The post Milan to Try to Remove Real Madrid Hold over Youngster appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Abdukodir Khusanov: Could Pep Guardiola be "tempted" by "Kyle Walker-esque" right-back alternative after "massive" Manuel Akanji injury blow?
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola could be tempted to use Abdukodir Khusanov as a "Kyle Walker-esque" right-back now that Manuel Akanji is facing a lengthy spell out injured, Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Giménez credits Milan fans for his strong start
arts.sum: Mexico forward Santi Giménez has said he is playing well because of the confidence the coaching staff, teammates and fans at AC Milan are giving him.
